anglophone.title: Evette, backed by Trump, and Wilson, a Trump supporter, head to S.C. governor runoff
anglophone.excerpt: In South Carolina, both Republican candidates for governor are MAGA devotees, but Trump only endorsed Lt. Gov. Pamela Evette, not Attorney General Alan Wilson. The two are headed to a GOP runoff.

anglophone.excerpt: President Donald Trump earlier accused Iran of shooting down the US helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz and vowed to respond.

anglophone.title: House approves labor-friendly bill with support from 20 Republicans
anglophone.excerpt: The House has approved a bill to slash the time it takes for newly unionized workers to get a first contract. The measure allows for government intervention if a deal is not reached within 90 days.

anglophone.title: Three judges, three scandals and new scrutiny of judicial accountability
anglophone.excerpt: Three judges are facing misconduct allegations in three different states, putting pressure on the federal judiciary's system for policing bad behavior in its own ranks.

anglophone.title: House passes bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol through the remainder of Trump's term
anglophone.excerpt: The bill provides roughly $70 billion for immigration enforcement and highlights a GOP caucus continuing to endorse Trump's immigration agenda as Democrats warn Congress has ceded its oversight role.

anglophone.title: Why there's a debate over the new quarantine center for Americans at risk of Ebola
